character.name: Ranger
character.prompt: lean archer with hood loosely framing sharp focused face with alert eyes, worn dark leather armor with earthy tones, longbow held upright with rift-infused arrow nocked and glowing blue-purple at tip, quiver visible on back, upright ready stance showing precision and control, rift energy blue-purple on arrow tip and bow limbs, dark earthy palette deep forest greens and muted browns with rift blue-purple glow accents, dark fantasy roguelite, RIMA universe
